Title: Destruction of cultural heritage during the Israeli invasion of the Gaza Strip
Paragraph: During its invasion of the Gaza Strip beginning in 2023, the military of the state of Israel has destroyed or damaged hundreds of culturally or historically significant buildings, libraries, museums, and other repositories of knowledge in Gaza, alongside the destruction of intangible cultural heritage. Nearly 80% of the buildings in Gaza have been damaged or destroyed and 1.9 million people have been displaced.
